content/01-18-25.content:
What’s the point of this shit ???
What the purpose is ???
If you ain’t making no progress then why you do it then ???
Who said I ain’t making progress…
I’m the voice in your head…
It’s hard for me to connect with artist we dont share the same craft…
Deception and the games of perception aint never been my bag…
My momma said I’m bad at lying, my eyes a easy tell…
The older I get the less Im trying to
As we toil in summer heat picking weeds til our fingers bleed…
You greatly underestimated my
